hero.heading: Care that begins with
hero.subhead: A physician known for taking the time to listen, building real relationships, and helping patients feel genuinely cared for.

drStewart.heading: Meet Dr.
drStewart.bio1: Dr. Stewart brings more than 25 years of private-practice experience to adult primary care — board-certified in internal medicine, with a particular passion for women's health and deep experience across the full spectrum of adult primary care.
drStewart.bio2: She moved to Vero Beach in 2022 and, after caring for veterans at the VA, is excited to return to the kind of private practice she spent most of her career building — one rooted in long-term relationships and continuity of care. She is especially looking forward to caring for the young adults aging out of Vero Beach Pediatrics and the parents who've been part of that family for years.

cta.heading: Ready to become a patient?
cta.subhead: New patients are welcome. Schedule your first visit in minutes.
